hyperedges.label: WCAG 2.1 AA Accessibility Compliance Across All UIs
CSS Variable Design Token System (No Hardcoded Colors)
Server Action Error Handling Pipeline (Validate → Auth → Execute → Respond)

nodes.label: Admin API Client (cardApi, benefitApi, userApi, auditApi)
Rationale: No Hardcoded Colors (CSS Variables Only)
Rationale: No mx-4 on Modal (Breaks Centering)
ERROR_CODES Enum (Auth, Validation, Resource, Conflict, Rate Limit, Server)
Server Action Pattern (Validate → Authenticate → Authorize → Execute)
Prisma Error Mapping (P2002 → CONFLICT_DUPLICATE, P2025 → RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND)
Rationale: Validate → Auth → Authorize → Execute Order (Cost Optimization)
Rationale: Separate Client/Server Error Messages (No Implementation Details Leaked)
